title: Anzat Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MaggotsCantina-Republic72.jpg|thumb]]
'''Anzat Spaceport''' was a major [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Anzat/Legends|Anzat]]. It was a safe place for the offworlders who came to refuel their [[Starship/Legends|starships]] or for business issues. [[Maggot's Cantina]] was located in Anzat Spaceport.

{{City-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]]
